# osgen json.RawMessage allowlist - DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
# Regenerate by re-running `cmd/osgen` with `-update-raw-message-allowlist`.
#
# Each line is a permitted json.RawMessage use, keyed "GoTypeName/jsonFieldName".
# Whole-response raw bodies use "<Prefix>Resp/-"; map/array responses whose
# element type is unresolved use "<Prefix>Resp/[entries]" and "<Prefix>Resp/[records]".
# The trailing "# form" comment is informational and ignored on load.
#
# A new entry here means the generator emitted a raw json.RawMessage where a
# typed struct was expected. Confirm the degradation is intended before adding.

# --- _common ---
